category_sources: Official GitHub README says hBlock blocks ads, tracking scripts, and malware domains by creating hosts and related formats.
source_facts.description says hBlock creates a hosts file from multiple sources for ad blocking.
docs_sources: Official README states the --help option or hblock.1.md file contains the full option list.
source_facts.homepage points to the official hBlock site; GitHub README is the primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/hectorm/hblock; per instruction repo returned as null without second-guessing.
tags_sources: Official GitHub topics include dns, security, tracking, privacy, malware, ads, ad-blocker, hosts, and shell.
Official README says hBlock blocks ads, tracking scripts, and malware domains using hosts files and other formats.
